overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from a cyberpunk-style game, walking through a neon-lit urban alley at night. The player approaches a group of NPCs conversing near a shuttered storefront, then continues past food vendor carts with glowing neon signs and wet reflective pavement.

segments.scene_description: The player circles around three NPCs conversing in an alcove under a fluorescent light. One person in a white hoodie gestures animatedly while another smokes. A green dumpster is visible to the right as the camera moves around the group.

segments.scene_description: The player emerges from the alcove into an open street with wet asphalt reflecting neon lights. A red BB Shack neon sign glows in the distance as the player approaches two food carts—one with a glowing red grill and another with a colorful umbrella.

segments.scene_description: The player approaches the food cart with the colorful umbrella, moving around it to observe the vendor preparing food. The warm yellow neon light from the cart illuminates the scene as the wet street continues to reflect the surrounding city lights.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey through a narrow, neon-lit alleyway that gradually opens into a vibrant street food market. It begins by moving along a wet concrete path illuminated by pink neon lights, drawing closer to a group of three NPCs gathered by a shuttered garage door. As the camera circles the group in a fluorescent-lit alcove, it passes a green dumpster and an animated figure in a white hoodie before emerging into a wider street of reflective asphalt. The scene then expands toward the distant glow of a red BB Shack sign and a pair of food carts, one featuring a glowing red grill and another with a colorful umbrella. Finally, the camera glides around the umbrella-topped cart, shifting into the warm yellow neon light of the vendor's station as the surrounding city lights shimmer on the wet ground.
